product.name: ArSuprem Moda Pro
product.familyDescriptorPl: Robocze modowe — stretch i polar, wielobrandowe
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fashion workwear — stretch and fleece, multi-brand
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.titleDescriptor: 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Jersey Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric
product.specLine: 220 g/m², 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
descriptions: Antistatic Jersey Knit Fabric 60% modacrylic 38% cotton 2% carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic knit fabric . ArSuprem Moda Pro fabric are mostly used by welders, electrical workers and firefighters.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
ArSuprem Moda pro are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification.
Suitable for antistatic applications, certified for EN ISO 1149.
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.
60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Jersey Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric
220 g/m², 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Done | EN ISO 11612

acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit EN ISO 20471 certification and hi-vis category classification confirm high-visibility application.

evidence: ArSuprem Moda Pro fabric are mostly used by welders, electrical workers and firefighters.
EN 61482 arc flash protection class 1 (4 kA)
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit statement of use by welders combined with arc-flash protection certification directly supports welding application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Explicit mention of electrical workers as primary users combined with antistatic and arc-flash protection certifications supports energy sector application.
Explicit mention of firefighters as primary users combined with flame/heat protection certification supports firefighting application.

evidence: categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly categorized as a hi-vis warp knit fabric for safety jackets and carries EN ISO 20471 certification, making high-visibility apparel the clearest and most direct commercial application.

evidence: ArSuprem Moda Pro fabric are mostly used by welders, electrical workers and firefighters.
EN 61482 arc flash protection class 1 (4 kA)
secondary.rationale: Explicit statement that the fabric is used by welders, combined with arc-flash protection certification (EN 61482), independently supports a welding/metal-processing end use beyond the primary hi-vis classification.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Electrical workers and antistatic/arc-flash properties are mentioned, but this overlaps heavily with the welding evidence and only one secondary can be selected; welding is named first and more specific to the metal-processing hazard context.

Firefighters are mentioned as users, but this appears alongside welders and electrical workers as a general list rather than a dominant firefighting-specific product framing; flame retardancy alone is insufficient per rule 9.

modelOutput.reviewReason: The description lists three distinct professional user groups (welders, electrical workers, firefighters) making the secondary application choice ambiguous; welding was selected but energy or firefighting are also defensible secondary candidates.
